programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Oona and May argue over which one is the fastest and decide to have a race to find out.
The Puffin family take a fun trip to the underwater cave.
Happy worries that there's going to be a catastrophe in Sunny River.
Fancy Restaurant: The girls set up a romantic dinner for their mum and dad. Everything goes according to plan, until chef Bingo's special arrives.
User OMS 1942: Oswaldo tells his friends that he thinks his life is part of a TV show.
The Whisper: Oswaldo brags about not being afraid of anything and invites Leia and Tobias to watch a new horror movie at his home.
Daniel and his friends are making 'Just Like Me' pictures at school today. When Miss Elaina spills red paint on Daniel's project, he gets mad at his friend.
While tending to his prized pumpkin plant, Nitrogen accidentally causes chaos for the Atoms of Atom Town.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'train' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure!
Grandmaster Glitch makes popcorn in Mount Etna, blocking the volcano and endangering the farms.
It's Mojo versus some very pesky birds on a supersonic pizza delivery run!
Kookoo Guru: Titus laughs at Great Know-it-all's predictions... but when Nina warns that anyone who mocks him might cause trouble.
The Treasure Hunt: Disaster strikes! Ollie has lost one of Bella's picnic props and must find it before her sister notices. To help, she enlists GreenBeard, the expert in lost treasures...

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: The Chicken and the Eggs: Fur Taxi's latest gig: to deliver a mother hen and her eggs to Dr. Froydus.
The Perfect Present: Doodle's 'hatch day' is approaching. Odo feels the pressure of coming up with the perfect present for his best friend.
Shake a Tail Feather: When Leonardo loses a most prized tail feather, he goes into a melodramatic tailspin of shame.
Sonia finds a shell to throw in the Thanking Fountain and decides to put Granny's needs first. (SL)
Sonia learns to turn something she doesn't like, the sound of thunder, into something that can be a fun game. (SL)
Startle Brush Color: Fuzzy Yellow startles Bao Bao, and Bao Bao turns white. Intrigued, Bao Bao offers to be a canvas for all the friends to paint on. (SL)
Oona and May argue over which one is the fastest and decide to have a race to find out.
The Puffin family take a fun trip to the underwater cave.
Happy worries that there's going to be a catastrophe in Sunny River.
Plom's Big Book Day: To celebrate Pop Paper City's Big Book Day, the friends are all going to read their favourite stories out loud.
Henry meets a friendly Daffodil. He is getting ready to welcome some new plants to the garden when they arrive a day early. Henry becomes a Gardener for the day.
Mermaid: The kids are taking photos for a display at school but Fifi hasn't got hers yet - she needs Stanley's help to get a picture of a Mermaid!
Leaves: It's autumn and there are so many leaves all over the town.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
An tSain-Ialtóg: Nuair a chaithfidh an criú ialtóg a thabhairt abhaile, iompaíonn Shelby bun os cionn chun í a dhéanamh compordach - ach cuireann sé seo gach rud trí chéile!
Blobaí: Nuair a thuirlingíonn an criú ar phláinéad mistéireach gorm, faigheann siad amach go bhfuil an pláinéad iomlán beo... agus nach dtaitníonn an criú leis ar chor ar bith!
Making Tracks: On a lovely snowy day at the zoo, the Peeks feed the penguins before a spot of ice-skating.
The Camels Grumpy Day: The camels, Bernard and Nora, are very out of sorts so Mr. Peek calls in Dr. Sue, who diagnoses a bad case of the grumps!
Tá Peppa ag dul chuig an dochtúir dá scrúdú sláinte rialta. Tugann sí leabhar beag dearg léi ina bhfuil gach fás agus forbairt atá déanta go dtí seo aici scríofa ann
Tugann Peppa agus George leo a gcuid scútar agus clár scátála go dtí an pháirc.
Everyone is sharing what their favourite things are. Oisín uses his new camera to take photographs as he searches for his favourite object.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters and focusing iin this episode on Polly the tiger.
Everyone wants cake but no-one wants to help make it. Simon tells the story of The Little Red Hen.
Finders Keepers: Huey and Reggie were wrestling by the seaside when both of them accidentally fell into the sea. Underwater, they discovered a large shell and a glowing pearl.
Andy And The Flying Fox: Andy heads to Australia and embarks on an epic adventure with little red flying foxes.
It's Mojo versus some very pesky birds on a supersonic pizza delivery run!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Shiny Spiffy Sandy: After the vehicles decide to show their best-selves by staying clean and sparkling for the Tidmouth Sheds open house, they are confronted by sinkhole ruining the tracks.
No No No: While helping Mum babysit their neighbour Sally, Maddie + Triggs learn that words can sometimes be confusing, especially if they're coming from the mouth of a mischevious toddler.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Earth Explorers
programmes.show_description: Caves: Nina investigates how caves were formed, with the help of Belle her hearing neuron.
Mission: Seaside: Kika and Dr Amit learn a new route on their way to the seaside.
Réaltaí: Tarraingíonn MeMo agus BaBa pictiúir de réaltaí reatha ach ní fhaca BaBa fíorcheann riamh roimhe. Caithfidh BaBa fanacht go dtí go mbeidh sé dorcha.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Oona and Silky mistakenly draw unwanted attention to the Crabs from the Gulls.
Baba, Pip and Pop spend the day together, but Pip keeps getting left out!
Happy feels frustrated when Olivia tries to make everything perfect.
Piggyback: The Heelers take a late afternoon walk by the river, but Bingo decides she's too tired to walk any further and needs a piggyback.
Jermaine Fire and Magic Show: Jermaine shows up at school with new magic tricks. He gets nervous when trying to do a trick with Leia and ends up vanishing.
Meta Metamorphosis: Oswaldo, Leia and Tobias meet Danix, a rebel who wants to teach them how to be rebel themselves.
Grandpere is visiting Daniel and they are baking raisin bread together. Daniel learns that sometimes it's good to take your time, and it can be worth the wait.
Oxygen & Hydrogen try to build the world's biggest snowman, but a runaway snowball soon threatens the whole town.
Deed encourages a friend to say 'socks' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure!
Glitch wants to ski, so the Grimbots give Table Mountain a snowy peak, which threatens its rare plants.
Mojo and Bo need to get Felix, Dot, and Nan's giant pie all across the lake at once. But Felix wants the pie and Dot wants Felix, so it'll take some creative puzzle-solving!
Astro Zero: Quasar is heartbroken: without his Astro-Punch, he's not allowed to be an Astro Hero! Thinking he's no good without it, he loses all confidence...
What a kind Piggy!: Greenbeard asks Piglet to find him a map of the attic and, very proud of his trick, takes advantage of the fact that his back is turned to rob his shop.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Lex's Café: Lex and Plu have had bad luck with customers and decide to take the day off. After heading to Boris's, Lex finds out that Boris wants to take the day off, so he offers to fill in.
A Puzzling Chicken: In the annual puzzle competition, Odo and Doodle are unexpectadly teamed.
The Dream: Odo relates to the campers a superhero dream that he had... but he woke up before the dream ended and now the campers are all desperate to hear how the dream turned out.
Baking a pie becomes a lot to juggle until Hugo and Sonia learn to focus on one task at a time. (SL)
When Sonia forgets to bring Dino to a playdate, she discovers he's having his own special adventure at home. (SL)
Sing Wet Automatic: Fuzzy Yellow and Marzipan discover musical puddles, but the music they make doesn't appeal to their friend Moon. (SL)
Oona and Silky mistakenly draw unwanted attention to the Crabs from the Gulls.
Baba, Pip and Pop spend the day together, but Pip keeps getting left out!
Happy feels frustrated when Olivia tries to make everything perfect.
Downhill Racers: It's the annual Pop Paper City go kart race, and Zip has chosen the racecourse. Can Zip make this year's go-kart race the best one yet?
Henry meets a friendly Mountain. He has a nasty itch that he just can't scratch and it's up to Henry to save the day.
Bus Train: Cynthia's bus is having an upgrade, so Stanley creates a special bus out of different vehicles to take everyone to their classes at the community centre.
Bell: The old bell at the Town Hall has lost its 'ding-dong' so Stanley is enrolled to make a new modern one.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
Láiblín Lofa: Tá paisinéir Láiblín i bhfolach ar bord Shelby - agus beidh ar Adam agus an criú 'boladh thar a bheith bréan' a chruthú chun an praiseach seo a ghlanadh suas.
Balla na bPéisteanna: Tá péisteanna ollmhóra ag gluaiseacht go tapa trasna pláinéad nua a bhfuil cuma cháise air agus tá Adam buartha go bhfuil siad faoi strus ag iódalú Bubby
Brewster, Maggie, and Ginger talk about what keeps them warm in the snow.
Brewster and his friends wonder about the other half of the moon while using Brewster's new telescope to look at it.
Tá Grampy Rabbit ag caint leis na páistí faoi dhreapadóireacht san ionad dreapadóireachta.
Tá Peppa, George agus Freddy Fox amuigh sa mbád in éineacht le Grandpa. Tá siad ag spraoi foghlaithe mara.
A live show will be taking place in Tír na nÓg where everyone will have the chance to show off their talents. Oisín is figuring out what his talent is.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
With the support of her friends, Diva discovers she can dance, even though she thought it was impossible.
Wrong Tag: Reggie, waking up later than usual, had red eyes, a fever, and a rash. Despite Maya advising Reggie to rest, Reggie sneaks out to play while Maya is away.
Andy And The Jackson's Widowbird: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to Brazil to take photos of a family of marmosets
